capabilities.name: Agent console
capabilities.verify: support_list_conversations + support_assign_conversation skillSeeds; LiveSupportPage.tsx full agent console

capabilities.name: Visitor queue
capabilities.verify: support_list_conversations status=waiting_agent; LiveSupportPage Waiting list via useSupportConversations

capabilities.name: Canned responses
capabilities.verify: no canned-response skill or admin UI found (grep 'canned' hits nothing in live support)

capabilities.name: Transfer between agents
capabilities.verify: support_assign_conversation skill accepts agent_id for reassign
capabilities.notes: Admin UI missing: LiveSupportPage only supports take-to-self and close, no reassign-to-another-agent control

capabilities.name: Conversation history
capabilities.verify: support_list_conversations status=closed; VisitorSessionsTab.tsx browses past visitor sessions and messages

capabilities.name: Agent availability/presence
capabilities.verify: useSupportPresence.tsx realtime presence + status dropdown in LiveSupportPage
capabilities.notes: Skill surface missing: no presence/availability skill in live-support-module skillSeeds
